Welcome to My Blog: Thoughts on 5G, IMS, and Beyond

An introduction to this blog and what you can expect — deep dives into 5G Core architecture, IMS design patterns, protocol analysis, and the intersection of telecom with data engineering.

5G IMS Telecom
Topics
5G IMS Telecom
How to Add a Post

Create a new file in _posts/ with the format:

YYYY-MM-DD-post-title.md

Add the front matter with layout: post, title, and tags.
